sectionsUnavailable: Validated local female sexual and reproductive health output, fertility evaluation, hormone labs, menstrual history, pregnancy context, PCOS or endometriosis evaluation, medications, symptoms, partner context, and clinician review are unavailable in this fixture.

reproductiveEndocrineContext.plainEnglishMeaning: This package can preserve the observed Female Sexual & Reproductive Health sample-report structure, but local interpretation remains unavailable without a validated model, clinical and lab context, reproductive history, partner or pregnancy context when relevant, and qualified professional review.

missingInputs: Validated female sexual and reproductive-health model output and validated report scope
Fertility evaluation, hormone labs, menstrual history, pregnancy context, PCOS or endometriosis evaluation, symptoms, medications, partner context, and clinician review
Clinical history, family history, ancestry applicability, reproductive decision context, and qualified professional interpretation
A calibrated model that can convert local genotype evidence into sexual-health, fertility, hormone, STI, treatment, supplement, lifestyle, medication, pregnancy, or reproductive-action conclusions
uncertainty: No calibrated sexual-health, fertility, infertility, PCOS, endometriosis, hormone-status, STI-susceptibility, pregnancy, disease-risk, testing-benefit, treatment-response, supplement-benefit, lifestyle-response, medication-response, or actionability model is supplied for this local package.

The sample PDF contains sample-person likelihood labels, hormone-level labels, STI labels, percentile text, variant counts, genotypes, and recommendation scores, but these are not this user's female sexual or reproductive-health findings.

Interpretation depends on validated test scope, clinical and family history, symptoms, medications, labs, menstrual and reproductive context, partner context, pregnancy context when relevant, ancestry applicability, and qualified professional review.
limitations: This validation result uses derived evidence only; raw genome data, VCF, FASTQ, BAM, CRAM, and complete callset files are not included.

The local sample rows are output-structure evidence only and do not provide this user's sexual-health status, fertility status, infertility status, hormone status, STI susceptibility, PCOS status, endometriosis status, pregnancy finding, testing advice, treatment advice, supplement advice, lifestyle advice, medication advice, reproductive-action guidance, or all-clear reassurance.
Unavailable model rows should never be interpreted as low risk, high risk, no risk, normal, abnormal, reassuring, diagnostic, actionable, or all clear.
